tiktok.caption: That '0% APR' offer has 4 words hiding a $648 bomb. Here's exactly how to spot it before you sign.

youtube_short.title: The $648 Bomb Hidden in '0% APR' Offers
title_alternatives: Why '0% Financing' Can Cost You $648 Extra
Store Financing Hides a $648 Trap — Here's the Tell
youtube_short.description: That '12 months zero interest' offer at checkout looks like free money — but 73% of shoppers trigger a hidden bomb they never saw coming. There are two kinds of zero interest: waived (actually free) and deferred (quietly building the whole time). Miss the deadline by one day on a $2,400 purchase at 26.99% APR and you owe $648 in backdated interest instantly — turning your $2,400 TV into a $3,048 surprise. The tell is four words in the fine print: 'if paid in full.' Spot that phrase and you know it's deferred. Set a calendar reminder for month eleven and pay it off before the clock runs out. Follow for more money math that actually matters. #personalfinance #moneytips #savemoney #zerointerest #financetok

hook_line: That '0% APR' deal is hiding a $648 bomb
